isi.lyrics:
Lyric late - come back home

Romanization

Since you’ve been gone
I can’t get enough of you
You’ve been on my mind
I don’t want to lose you

sigani eopdago mal haedo
gati gandago mal haetjana
You be up when my sunshine is gone
counting the hours when you’re gone

Ooh
Ooh
Ooh
Ooh

geu numbusin haetsallo nareul bwajwo
neoro inhae pieonan kkocheun sideul suneun eopji
eotteon sunggani uril chajawado
heundeulliji ankirohae
maeil yaksok hagirohae
You kiss me when I’m showing off signs
Head rush when you smile, you’re still mine
You are my main vice
I’ve been thinking about you

Since you’ve been gone
I can’t get enough of you
You’ve been on my mind
mannagi kkaji three words I kept it

Hangeul

Since you’ve been gone
I can’t get enough of you
You’ve been on my mind
I don’t want to lose you

시간이 없다고 말 해도
같이 간다고 말 했잖아
You be up when my sunshine is gone
counting the hours when you’re gone

Ooh
Ooh
Ooh
Ooh

그 눈부신 햇살로 나를 봐줘
너로 인해 피어난 꽃은 시들 수는 없지
어떤 순간이 우릴 찾아와도
흔들리지 않기로해
매일 약속 하기로해
You kiss me when I’m showing off signs
Head rush when you smile, you’re still mine
You are my main vice
I’ve been thinking about you

Since you’ve been gone
I can’t get enough of you
You’ve been on my mind
만나기 까지 three words I kept it

isi.lyrics:
Lyric late - museum

Romanization

I’ll be right back where you left me
I’ve been on a road but
Now I’m coming home
Oh Oh
I’ll be right back when you need me
I’ve been on a road
But now I’m coming home

Some say I don’t get it
You might think I’m going crazy
Wish I could explain it better
Wish it wasn't true, I know
Can we just take it slowly now?
Even though when I'm away from you
It’s getting late
neol saenggakhae
mami apeulttae kkaji
But think Im happier
than ever,
Life without you

You might say that I’m not a lover
So go along and call me a coward
30nyeon salme mugega neukkyeojine
So go ahead and call me fucking crazy
Cuz I’m just not like you,
I’m just not like you,
So Don’t fuck around and be a victim
I’m done feeling your pride
Just tell me how about you?
nae meoritsoge salgo inneun geot gata
gakkeumeun jugeotdago jeolmeum dwie sumeo
So I ma pray to God
I am say to you God
nae yeope amudo eomnae oh man
saneun ge jigyeowoseo ureo boado
geu nummul ttaemune yakbongjineun 2gae
3gaega doego ije neukkine
jungneun geon swipdago deureosseo, oh man
(It’s okay now)

Hangeul

I’ll be right back where you left me
I’ve been on a road but
Now I’m coming home
Oh Oh
I’ll be right back when you need me
I’ve been on a road
But now I’m coming home

Some say I don’t get it
You might think I’m going crazy
Wish I could explain it better
Wish it wasn't true, I know
Can we just take it slowly now?
Even though when I'm away from you
It’s getting late
널 생각해
맘이 아플때 까지
But think Im happier
than ever,
Life without you

You might say that I’m not a lover
So go along and call me a coward
30년 삶에 무게가 느껴지네
So go ahead and call me fucking crazy
Cuz I’m just not like you,
I’m just not like you,
So Don’t fuck around and be a victim
I’m done feeling your pride
Just tell me how about you?
내 머릿속에 살고 있는 것 같아
가끔은 죽었다고 젊음 뒤에 숨어
So I ma pray to God
I am say to you God
내 옆에 아무도 없내 oh man
사는 게 지겨워서 울어 보아도
그 눈물 때문에 약봉지는 2개
3개가 되고 이제 느끼네
죽는 건 쉽다고 들었어, oh man
(It’s okay now)

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Jae Woo AN - 어떡하라고 (Can't Do This Again)

Romanization

bappeun geo almyeonseo wae bulleosseo
eoje da kkeutnan geo anieosseo?
ara yeogi kkwae jaju watdeon got
geunde daeum dare manghandadeora uricheoreom

naega sajun gabangeul mego wanne neo
kkwae jeollyakjeogiya yesanghan daero
geureodago anajujin mothae
iyuneun nega jeil jal algetji

eoje sul chwihan nege geollyeoon jeonhwa
jamgyeore badatjiman deureosseo jeonghwakhi
eolleun kkeuneuraneun namjaae
jibe gal geonyaneun namjaae

geunde wae bulleosseo nal
joeun sori mothaejwo na
haejanghago deureoga

mwo eotteokharago nahante
mwo eotteokharago nahante
mwo eotteokharago nahante
mwo eotteokharago nahante

ije jigyeopda neoui nummul yeonggiga
sigani jinado neulji anneun ne yeonggiga
ppeonhan repeotori da
daeum daesaneun mwolkka

i taimingen
naega sseojun pyeonjireul kkeonaemyeo
ittaen saranghaji anannyago nal
geunyang anajumyeon an doenyago nal
sul chwihae haetdeon silsuil ppunirago

geunyang mannamyeon doeneunde geu namja aedeul
wae najen nahante wa anggineun geoya
gyaenega mot juneun mueongga inneun geoya
ijen nado mot jwo mwoga dwaetdeun mariya

nae sarangeun deouk
nae songgireun deouk
nae nunggireun deouk
nae dondeureun deouk
da mot jwo

mwo eotteokharago nahante
mwo eotteokharago nahante
mwo eotteokharago nahante
mwo eotteokharago nahante


Hangeul

바쁜 거 알면서 왜 불렀어
어제 다 끝난 거 아니었어?
알아 여기 꽤 자주 왔던 곳
근데 다음 달에 망한다더라 우리처럼

내가 사준 가방을 메고 왔네 너
꽤 전략적이야 예상한 대로
그렇다고 안아주진 못해
이유는 네가 제일 잘 알겠지

어제 술 취한 네게 걸려온 전화
잠결에 받았지만 들었어 정확히
얼른 끊으라는 남자애
집에 갈 거냐는 남자애

근데 왜 불렀어 날
좋은 소리 못해줘 나
해장하고 들어가

뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
뭐 어떡하라고 나한테

이제 지겹다 너의 눈물 연기가
시간이 지나도 늘지 않는 네 연기가
뻔한 레퍼토리 다
다음 대사는 뭘까

이 타이밍엔
내가 써준 편지를 꺼내며
이땐 사랑하지 않았냐고 날
그냥 안아주면 안 되냐고 날
술 취해 했던 실수일 뿐이라고

그냥 만나면 되는데 그 남자 애들
왜 낮엔 나한테 와 안기는 거야
걔네가 못 주는 무언가 있는 거야
이젠 나도 못 줘 뭐가 됐든 말이야

내 사랑은 더욱
내 손길은 더욱
내 눈길은 더욱
내 돈들은 더욱
다 못 줘

뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
뭐 어떡하라고 나한테
